testcase.name: basic case - delete from a Delta table - Partition=true
basic case - delete from a Delta table - Partition=false
where data columns and partition columns
data and partition columns - Partition=true Skipping=true
data and partition columns - Partition=false Skipping=true
data and partition columns - Partition=true Skipping=false
data and partition columns - Partition=false Skipping=false
Negative case - DELETE the child directory
condition having current_timestamp - Partition by Timestamp
SC-12232: should not delete the rows where condition evaluates to null
SC-12232: delete rows with null values using isNull
SC-12232: delete rows with null values using EqualNullSafe
delete with correlated EXISTS subquery

failure.message: org.apache.spark.SparkException: [INTERNAL_ERROR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND] Could not find c#57761 in [key#57908,value#57909]. SQLSTATE: XX000

testcase.name: delete with correlated NOT EXISTS subquery

failure.message: org.apache.spark.SparkException: [INTERNAL_ERROR_ATTRIBUTE_NOT_FOUND] Could not find c#58483 in [key#58630,value#58631]. SQLSTATE: XX000

testcase.name: nested schema pruning on data condition
Window functions in delete - expect exception: true
Aggregate functions in delete - expect exception: true
Generate functions in delete - expect exception: false
Generate functions in delete - expect exception: true
delete on partitioned table with special chars
